title: Design: dark gradient hero section — navy/purple bg, SVG bolt with glow animation
description: Hero section needs a dark background (navy/purple gradient) with white text. Replace the ⚡️ emoji with the actual SVG lightning bolt from the favicon. Add a subtle glow animation on the bolt. Spec the exact gradient colors, text hierarchy, and animation timing.

comment.body:
Hero section spec complete. Gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 40%, #2d1b69 80%, #1a0938 100%)` — navy-purple distinct from comparison section navy. Bolt path extracted from `/public/favicon.svg`, CSS-only glow animation at 3s cycle with `prefers-reduced-motion` respect.

Plan: [TESA-161#document-plan](/TESA/issues/TESA-161#document-plan)
